_note: MCP server configuration for sdd_toolkit_v14. 'ctx' (Phase 3) and 'law' (Phase 5) are in-process SDK servers via create_sdk_mcp_server. 'kb' is a REST/HTTP server — it is NOT a stdio MCP server and must NOT be stdio-handshaked by Claude; start it separately.

ctx._note: Phase 3 — context_server: in-process SDK MCP (create_sdk_mcp_server). Runs inside the Python process via claude_agent_sdk, not as a separate process. No stdio handshake. (dir renamed mcp/→mcp_servers/ to avoid shadowing the PyPI 'mcp' package.)

law._note: Phase 5 — constitution_server: in-process SDK MCP (create_sdk_mcp_server). Implemented. Tools: list_articles, get_article. Parses specs/constitution.md. Path override via SDD_CONSTITUTION_PATH env var.

kb._note: IMPORTANT: This is a FastAPI/uvicorn REST server (HTTP on localhost:8741), NOT a stdio MCP server. Do NOT let Claude or any MCP client attempt a stdio handshake with this entry — it will fail. Start it separately with: python3 scripts/mcp_server/server.py (or: uvicorn mcp_server.server:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8741 --app-dir scripts). This entry is kept here for documentation purposes only; remove or comment it out if your MCP runtime tries to auto-launch it as a stdio server.
